objective: Cycle 16 — Bug hunt C15 (found double-reward bug) + fix BUGFIX-026 + feat echo_memory LLM context + tension_zone injection
checkpoint: Bug hunt on C15 (store_run.gd run_history + echo_memory): found HIGH bug — double reward application. StoreRun.handle_run_end() applies rewards via dispatch, then game_controller_effects.apply_run_rewards() applied them AGAIN from controller L666. Player got 2x Anam, 2x total_runs, 2x run_history entries. Fix: removed duplicate apply_run_rewards call. Feature: wired echo_memory (deaths_by_biome, dominant_factions_seen, total_runs) + tension_zone + convergence_zone into LLM narrative context. build_context_enrichment() now formats cross-run memory for Merlin's narrative callbacks ('Le voyageur a deja peri ici', 'Veteran de N quetes'). 3 files modified, 40 lines changed. 26 total bugs fixed across 16 cycles.
